aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.description: Since 2011 we have helped thousands feel their best with premium vitamins and supplements. Our mission is honest formulas, transparent sourcing, and a routine you can stick to—delivered to your door.

aboutPage.welcomeBody: Vital started with one question: how can everyday wellness be simple and trustworthy? We curate lab-tested vitamins, minerals, and supplements for busy people, families, and workplaces—so you can support immunity, energy, and long-term health without guesswork.
aboutPage.valueQualityDescription: We partner with certified manufacturers and third-party testing so every batch meets strict quality standards.
aboutPage.valueSatisfactionDescription: Your experience matters. Our team helps you choose the right products and adjust your plan whenever life changes.
aboutPage.valueHealthDescription: We focus on ingredients and dosages aligned with current research—not trends without substance.
aboutPage.processCraftedDescription: Nutritionists and partners design blends that work together and fit real lifestyles.
aboutPage.processDeliveredDescription: Temperature-aware packing and reliable carriers keep your supplements protected in transit.
aboutPage.processEnjoyDescription: Set up repeat deliveries or order as you go—consistency is easier when we handle the rest.
aboutPage.imgHeroAlt: Vitamins and supplement bottles on a bright surface
aboutPage.imgProcessEnjoyAlt: Person taking daily vitamins at home

vitaminPage.heroSubtitle: Curated supplements for home, office, and teams
vitaminPage.intro: Vital brings lab-tested vitamins and supplements to families, companies, and individuals. Choose curated packs or build your own stack—quality products delivered when you need them.
vitaminPage.cardFamiliesDescription: Daily multivitamins and essentials for adults and kids in one household plan.
vitaminPage.cardTeamsDescription: Corporate wellness boxes with immune and energy support for your staff.
vitaminPage.cardPersonalizedDescription: Mix and match products or get guidance from our wellness quiz.

howToSubscribe.title: How it works
howToSubscribe.subtitle: Start your vitamin routine in three easy steps: pick a plan, tailor products to your goals, and receive deliveries on your schedule.

choosePlan.title: Step 1 – Choose your plan
choosePlan.description: Browse family packs, office bundles, or build a personal stack from our catalog.

customizeMenu.title: Step 2 – Customize your stack
customizeMenu.description: Set dosages, add or swap products, and choose how often you want deliveries.

receiveEnjoy.title: Step 3 – Receive & stay consistent
receiveEnjoy.description: We pack and ship on your schedule. Reminders and flexible dates help you never miss a day.
